class.name: PlayFabMultiplayer
class.brief_description: PlayFab Multiplayer lobby and matchmaking service.
class.description: Accessed through [code]PlayFab.multiplayer[/code]. All user-owned calls require a signed-in [PlayFabUser] and use that user's native entity handle. Matchmaking completion reports arranged-lobby connection strings but never auto-joins them. Failed lobby create/join completions detach their temporary [PlayFabLobby] wrapper and do not appear in [method get_lobbies]. If finishing lobby or matchmaking state changes fails, [signal multiplayer_error] is emitted and the service resets to an uninitialized state; call [method initialize_async] again before issuing more Multiplayer calls.

method.name: initialize_async
method.description: Initializes PlayFab Multiplayer after [PlayFab] is initialized.

method.name: is_initialized
method.description: Returns whether PlayFab Multiplayer is initialized.

method.name: create_lobby_async
method.description: Creates and joins a lobby for [param user].

method.name: join_lobby_async
method.description: Joins a lobby using a connection string.

method.name: join_arranged_lobby_async
method.description: Explicitly joins an arranged lobby using a connection string from a matched ticket.

method.name: get_lobbies
method.description: Returns tracked, connected lobbies. Failed create/join attempts are removed before their failure signal completes.

method.name: get_lobby
method.description: Returns a tracked lobby by id.

signal.name: state_changed
signal.description: Aggregate lobby and matchmaking state signal.

signal.name: invite_received
signal.description: Emitted when a lobby invite arrives.

signal.name: multiplayer_error
signal.description: Emitted for Multiplayer dispatch errors. A [code]lobby_state_finish_failed[/code] or [code]matchmaking_state_finish_failed[/code] result means the native dispatcher was reset and [method initialize_async] must succeed before further Multiplayer use.
